fund_type: An open-ended equity investment strategy investing in listed equity and equity related instruments including limited short exposure in equity through derivative instruments.

investment_limits.minimum_application_amount: The minimum aggregate investment by an investor across all investment strategies offered by Titanium SIF, at the Permanent Account Number (‘PAN’) level, shall not be less than INR 10 lakh. Provided that the requirement of minimum investment amount shall not apply to an accredited investor.
investment_limits.minimum_redemption_amount:
500
The redemption will be subject to compliance with provisions mentioned under “Minimum investment threshold”

exit_load:
1. Redemption/Switch-out on or before expiry of 1 month from the date of allotment: 1%
2. Redemption/Switch-out after expiry of 1 month from the date of allotment-Nil
